ShortDescription.Value: Development overlay for real-world CS2 map bundles.

Publish.LongDescription:
CityTimelineMod is a development code mod for Cities: Skylines II.
It loads a local CS2 export bundle generated by the Minneapolis pipeline and renders real-world GeoJSON overlays in game: - roads and paths - water lines and water areas - zoning polygons - worldmap and heightmap bounds
Current status: - local development build - manifest-driven bundle loading - debug HUD for visibility, alpha, height and performance controls - not final public gameplay content
